Danny Denenberg    👕 About    📜 Archive    🍯 Feed

About

Danny is an award winning actor, singer, musician, and works as a software dev (previously @ Gallup and the University of Nebraska at Omaha). He lives in Omaha, the silicon valley of the midwest (hell yeah 🎉), with his crazy, awesome family.

He is way too passionate about music and spends more time than he should playing Scott Joplin rags or Bach preludes and fugues. If you ever want to get him started talking non stop about something, please mention the latter (really, try it).

Just to clear up any would-be confusion, Danny is related to some other Denenbergs that have websites, namely Larry and Steve.

He’s also a writer for Alligator.io, and his posts have been published in a few Medium publications such as BecomingHuman.ai, Better Programming, and The Startup. Interestingly enough, one of his posts has been translated into Russian 🤨🎉…

Want to see a cool pic? Perhaps, my favorite image of my dad.

About the site

In case you were wondering, this site is:

  • Designed and coded on a Mac in Nebraska
  • Coded with Visual Studio Code
  • Built on Jekyll, the open source static site generator
  • Hosted on Netlify Github Pages for 0 dollars

You can find some other things I’ve done with my Mac on GitHub.

Interested in the theme of this website?

Let’s get in touch

If you have any questions, feel free to open a new issue or email me at danny@denenberg.com.
